mapper.insert: insert into user (name, openid, create_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{openid}, #{createTime})

insert into user ( name, openid, phone, gender, id_number, preference_completed, current_flight_id, cabin_type, create_time ) values ( #{name}, #{openid}, #{phone}, #{gender}, #{idNumber}, #{preferenceCompleted}, #{currentFlightId}, #{cabinType}, #{createTime} )
mapper.select: select u.id as userId, ifnull(u.name, concat('旅客', u.id)) as name, u.id_number as idNumber, case when u.id_number is not null and length(trim(u.id_number)) = 18 and trim(u.id_number) regexp '^[0-9]{17}[0-9Xx]$' then case when str_to_date(substring(trim(u.id_number), 7, 8), '%Y%m%d') is not null then timestampdiff(year, str_to_date(substring(trim(u.id_number), 7, 8), '%Y%m%d'), curdate()) when substring(trim(u.id_number), 7, 4) regexp '^(19|20)[0-9]{2}$' then greatest(0, year(curdate()) - cast(substring(trim(u.id_number), 7, 4) as unsigned)) else null end else null end as age, u.phone as phone, case when u.gender = 1 then '男' when u.gender = 0 then '女' else '未知' end as gender, case when exists( select 1 from user_preference up join user uu on uu.id = up.user_id where (u.id_number is not null and uu.id_number = u.id_number) or (u.id_number is null and up.user_id = u.id) ) then 1 else 0 end as preferenceCompleted, case when u.current_flight_id is not null then '已绑定' else '未绑定' end as bindStatus, case when exists( select 1 from meal_selection ms where ms.user_id = u.id and ms.flight_id = #{flightId} ) then '已选餐' else '未选餐' end as mealSelected ,u.cabin_type as cabinType ,case when u.cabin_type = 1 then '头等舱' when u.cabin_type = 2 then '商务舱' else '经济舱' end as cabinTypeLabel ,u.current_flight_id as flightId ,fi.flight_number as flightNumber ,fi.departure as departure ,fi.destination as destination from user u left join flight_info fi on fi.id = u.current_flight_id where u.current_flight_id = #{flightId} order by u.id desc

select u.id as userId, ifnull(u.name, concat('旅客', u.id)) as name, u.id_number as idNumber, case when u.id_number is not null and length(trim(u.id_number)) = 18 and trim(u.id_number) regexp '^[0-9]{17}[0-9Xx]$' then case when str_to_date(substring(trim(u.id_number), 7, 8), '%Y%m%d') is not null then timestampdiff(year, str_to_date(substring(trim(u.id_number), 7, 8), '%Y%m%d'), curdate()) when substring(trim(u.id_number), 7, 4) regexp '^(19|20)[0-9]{2}$' then greatest(0, year(curdate()) - cast(substring(trim(u.id_number), 7, 4) as unsigned)) else null end else null end as age, u.phone as phone, case when u.gender = 1 then '男' when u.gender = 0 then '女' else '未知' end as gender, case when exists( select 1 from user_preference up join user uu on uu.id = up.user_id where (u.id_number is not null and uu.id_number = u.id_number) or (u.id_number is null and up.user_id = u.id) ) then 1 else 0 end as preferenceCompleted, case when u.current_flight_id is not null then '已绑定' else '未绑定' end as bindStatus, case when u.current_flight_id is not null and exists( select 1 from meal_selection ms where ms.user_id = u.id and ms.flight_id = u.current_flight_id ) then '已选餐' else '未选餐' end as mealSelected, u.cabin_type as cabinType, case when u.cabin_type = 1 then '头等舱' when u.cabin_type = 2 then '商务舱' else '经济舱' end as cabinTypeLabel, u.current_flight_id as flightId, fi.flight_number as flightNumber, fi.departure as departure, fi.destination as destination from user u left join flight_info fi on fi.id = u.current_flight_id
and fi.flight_number like concat('%', #{flightNumber}, '%')
and u.name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
and u.id_number like concat('%', #{idNumber}, '%')
order by u.id desc
select distinct fi.* from user u inner join flight_info fi on fi.id = u.current_flight_id where u.id_number = #{idNumber} order by fi.departure_time desc, fi.id desc
